Metal Pipe [Zan]  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 4.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Metal Pipe [Zan]
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 4.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Engraved 'Zan'
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Atarak
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-30 11:42:24
Page Updated:Fri Sep 6th, 2024

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 47
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
a drolvarg pawbuster

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Dreadlands
Quest Name
The Lost Circle

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle


Uploaded September 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin

am i in the right spot
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2008 at 8:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592299551913
Scholar
36 posts
Ive went thru about 100 warlords and not sure how many rounds in chardok also. I am camping both camps at same time clearing one then going to other before repops even start to reclear and nothing in both camps im at the bridge keepers bridge killing all mobs on the bridges and around them close and nothing there im kiling the warlord/bodyguards and nothing there either what am i doing wrong ive read post afer post on both camps and nothing helping.have these mobs moved from a revamp sometime in the past as i did take about 2 yrs off from game. any help here would be greatful or if u on luclin send soalshaker a tell i am looking for any mqs i can get this monk 1.0 is makijng me mad and i thought my mage was rough this one looking like going turn into a 3 yr quest and i 5 box and can camp few camps at one time and keep clear but eqs 1.0s some of the mobs was just way out rediculous on gettting them to spawn.

k just got the pawbuster to spawn so was in right spot there now if the betrayer will spawn ill be happy and can move on and try for my robe to work on finishing this 1.0 cause it looks like after i get past this robe part rest is pretty easy and mobs will be there when i need them and get ready to kill them.

Don't know what kind of pipe you been smoking out of, but got a metal pipe from pawduster on 5-15-06 and it is no trade. Lucked into him on second set of spawns, his ph's are drolvarg bodyguard and warlord.
